executive_summary: During IPL 2026 Match 53 (CSK vs LSG) on May 10, 2026, CINEOS detected 20 illegal live streams broadcasting JioHotstar exclusive content without authorisation. Additionally, 13 Telegram channels with combined reach of 35M+ subscribers were actively promoting illegal streams during the match. Domain squatting of jiohotstar.net confirmed. All evidence IT Act 65B.

piracy_streams.evidence: Stream URLs captured, SHA-256 hashed during live match broadcast

piracy_streams.violation: Copyright Act 1957 Section 51 — Broadcasting Rights infringement

what_cineos_can_prove: 20 stream URLs captured during CSK vs LSG at 13:23 IST
Telegram channels posting piracy links during broadcast
jiohotstar.net domain confirmed live via WHOIS
All evidence SHA-256 hashed with timestamps
IT Act 65B compliant — admissible in proceedings
what_cineos_cannot_prove: Number of viewers on each illegal stream
Identity of stream operators (requires ISP + police)
requested_actions: File DMCA takedown for all 20 stream URLs
Escalate to MIB (Ministry of I&B) for broadcast piracy
cineos_offer: CINEOS can monitor every IPL match day in real time. New illegal streams detected within minutes. Telegram channels promoting piracy flagged live. Match-day intelligence feed: Rs 50L/year. Contact: yugandhar@cineos.in
